titleStmt.title: SII 34.54: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 54. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south and west walls of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: The trustees of the temple received 30 kalam of paddy from Nānāndūr-uḍaiyār Pugalivēndar, in lieu of which they remitted permanently the taxes due to temple from the monastery (guhai) called Tirumuḍiyāl-naḍandāṉ that was presided over by the donor. The paddy was set apart for the wages of the stone masons engaged for some renovation work in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ matiraiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulOttuṅkacOḻadevarku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu vikkiramacOḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu tiru Uṭaiyār kOyil śrīkāriyaṉ ceyvārum śrīmāheśvavarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārum devakaṉmi kOyil kaṇakkaṉum IvvaṉaivOm Innāyanār tirukkOyil kumpiṭṭu Irukkum Āṇṭār nānāntūr Uṭaiyār pukalivEntaṟku Upaiyattīṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivar Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkiṟa tirumuṭiyāl naṭantāṉ tirukkukai
kīḻaittiruvītiyil kīḻ ciṟakil cannati tirukkuḷattukku vaṭakku tiruvītikkukkiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai nānāntūr Uṭaiyār Inimaiyētaruvār maṉaikku teṟku kīḻpāṟ kellai kamuku tirunantavaṉattukku mēṟku Ippaṭi peru nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam kuḻi 6 10 5 Ikkuḻi Aṟupattaiñcukkum Āṭṭaikku śrī paṇṭārattu Iṟukkakkaṭavatāṉa nel 6 10 4 kalam Innel Aṟu kalane mukkuṟuṇiyum Āṭṭaikku Iṟukkumaṭattu Innellukku Upaiyappolicai celvutāka Ivvāṭṭai cittiraimāsattu Āṭṭaikkuk kalattukku patakku nāḻi nellu policai
polivatāka nel 3 10 kalam Innellu muppatiṉ kalamum Innāyanārkōyil nitta maṇṭapa tirukkaṟṟaḷi tiruppaṇi vaṭakkil cuvar kuṟaikiṭa Ittiruppaṇi ceykiṟa kaṟtaccaṟku paṇikkūlikku cilavāka kuṭuttu In nellāl vanta policai nel Aṟukalane mukkuṟuṇiyum Āṭṭaikku Ikkukaikku Ituvē Iṟuppāvatākavum Ippaṭi candrādittavarai celvatākavum Ikkukai Ivaṟkum Ivar cantānattil Uḷḷa māhēśvaraṟku Ippaṭi sommāvutākavum Ikkukaiyil mēnōkkiṉa maramum kīḻnōkkiṉa kiṇaṟum Eṟpērpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Aṉupavittu
Ippaṭi candrādittavaraiyum celvatāka Ittirukkōyil tirukkaṟṟaḷiyil kal veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākac coṉṉōm Ikkōyil tānattōm Ivaikaḷ Aruḷicceyya Ivvupaiyatīṭṭu Eḻutiṉēṉ Ikkōyil kaṇakku vaikāvūruṭaiyan tiruvaikāvuṭaiyanāṉa tiruvakampaṭip piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ikkōyil kaṇakku Āttūruṭaiyāṉ tēvarkaḷ nātaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ikkōyil tēvakaṉmi vaiykiṉanāyaka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ikkōyil
kaṇkāṇi kōyil kaṇakku paruttikkuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaikā Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrī māhēśvarakkaṇkāṇivuṭaiya tiruvuttaraṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkōyil śrīkāriyam karuppuṭaiyāṉ Āṟkkāṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ikkōyil caivācāriyam pullāli Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ikkōyil pūjikku nampimāril Araṇaippuṟattu Āḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉēṉ Innāyanār tirukkōyil tāṉattār Aruḷicceyya Ivupaiyattīṭṭuk kal veṭṭivittēṉ
vaṉṉiyan kāṇi Uṭaiya tiruveṉap pēṟuṭaiyāṉ tiruveḻucci Aḻakiyāṉ tiruveṉppēṟṟācāriyaṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
